items.summary: Add four new ant educational content components for: Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants (interpret user text "arm ants" as "army ants"), and Carpenter Ants. Each component must use clear, user-facing English text and follow the existing pest content layout patterns (cards + alerts) to cover: (1) basic identification cues and common signs, (2) where they are commonly found and what attracts them, (3) prevention steps, and (4) what to do if found (safe clean-up/control steps, monitoring, and when to call a professional). Include a prominent safety note about stings/allergic reactions where relevant, and include a prominent structural-damage caution for Carpenter Ants.

Integrate Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants into the pest selection UI in frontend/src/components/EducationalContent.tsx across the Identify, Habitats, Prevention, and Treatment tabs, consistent with the existing pattern (selection buttons + conditional rendering via renderPestContent).

Add static icon image assets for Black Ants, Red Ants, Army Ants, and Carpenter Ants under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the pest selection controls via tags with appropriate alt text, consistent with existing pest icon usage (e.g., cockroach/head-lice/spider icons).
